CustomField.description: The deepest discount (%) among the Quote's Services lines, stamped each save by QuoteTriggerHandler. Persisted so the next save can detect a worsening services-margin position and re-open a recorded Finance approval — the finance analogue of the blended-discount re-open. Automation-only.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Deepest Services-line discount. Trigger-maintained; drives Finance re-approval when services pricing worsens.
CustomField.label: Worst Services Line Discount
